visions.style: Aida's vision fills the entire frame as her POV into rose-pink haze: only the pier, small sailboat, Keen and Keen's Mum are visible inside the vision world; the glowing orb edge lives only at the outermost margins and dissolves into mist-darkness.
visions.materialize: Drifting rose-quartz light coalesces out of soft darkness into the later pier scene, then gently thins back into the bowl tone and morning cove air.

recurring.name: Keen's Mum
recurring.appearance: Adult female bear, same size class as Aida; natural pale-blue fur with gold scalloped collar and light-blue bow only, no clothes, no added accessories.
recurring.orientation: Anchored at Keen's pier; she remains on the dock as Keen's boat moves away, visually tied to home and the left-behind shore.

recurring.name: Squeaky
recurring.appearance: Small dolphin from locked Squeaky model sheet; playful chirps and clicks, no added markings or accessories.
recurring.orientation: First appears beside Keen's boat, keeps pace at sea, then leads and carries Keen toward Crystal Cove.

recurring.name: Father's cuffs - vacant
recurring.appearance: Two gold cuffs, band colour F1B43F, empty kite-shaped bezel with dark vacant recess 1A1A1A; meaningful worn heirlooms, not crystal-set yet.
recurring.orientation: Given by Keen's Mum at the pier and worn by Keen from Scene 3 through Scene 8; they may glow faint aquamarine underwater but remain physically vacant.

recurring.name: Father's cuffs - crystal-set
recurring.appearance: Same gold cuffs, band colour F1B43F, now each with a faceted Aquamarine kite gem approximately 47DFFF seated in the bezel.
recurring.orientation: Begin only after the aquamarine crystal splits and settles into the cuffs in Scene 9; must never appear before that moment.

persistent.in: Keen's sailboat at the pier and at sea until the boat is lost in the storm.
On Keen after his Mum places them in his paws and he slips them on; they persist through the storm rescue and beach welcome until the award ceremony changes their state.
On Keen from the crystal award onward through the final beach walk.
Wrapped around Squeaky's tail underwater until Keen tears it free.

lost.name: Keen's map
lost.reason: The storm wind snatches it from Keen's paws and it vanishes into the rain, making his performed confidence collapse into being truly lost.

lost.name: Keen's sailboat
lost.reason: The storm and rescue separate Keen from the boat; by the shore arrival it is gone, preserving the cost of the brave choice.

lost.name: Ragged drift net hold on Squeaky
lost.reason: Keen tears the net with a final pull, freeing Squeaky as the massive wave crashes overhead.

items.name: Crystal bowl and wand
items.appearance: Aida's sanctuary instrument for the low shimmering tone; bowl remains part of the cove sanctuary and does not travel.

items.name: Keen's sailboat
items.appearance: Small neat sailboat with mast, sail, and space for a rolled map, satchel, berry pouch, and blanket; starts tidy and controlled, later overwhelmed by storm.

items.name: Father's vacant cuffs
items.appearance: Two gold cuffs, F1B43F, dark empty kite-shaped recess 1A1A1A; heirloom weight, no gems until Scene 9.

items.name: Father's crystal-set cuffs
items.appearance: Same gold cuffs with faceted Aquamarine kite gems seated in both bezels, azure glow settled and warm.

items.name: Rolled map
items.appearance: Small travel map handled and checked by Keen, later turned upside down at sea.

items.name: Ragged drift net
items.appearance: Torn, rough sea net wrapped around Squeaky's tail underwater, heavy enough to drag him down.

items.name: Combined crystal beacon
items.appearance: A brilliant combined light burst cutting through storm rain from Crystal Cove toward the open sea.

items.name: Aquamarine award crystal
items.appearance: Glowing aquamarine light forming in the air, becoming one crystal, then splitting into two smaller gems that settle into Keen's cuffs.

worldState.change: Warm safe flower corridor receives the first distant thunder and slight light shift.
Rose-quartz vision occurs; the bowl tone fades into distant wind as Aida leaves purposefully.
Keen leaves home; Keen's Mum remains on the dock and the emotional state of home becomes absence rather than safety beside him.
Open water turns from navigable blue into storm-obscured grey; Keen loses the map and becomes truly lost.
Storm reaches the rainforest edge; Fuzzby and Zenny spot the distant boat and redirect toward Crystal Cove.
The beach becomes an emergency lookout; combined crystal beacon is sent across the storm-dark sea.
Storm peaks; Squeaky is freed, Keen's boat is lost, and Keen's vacant cuffs first glow from within underwater.
The shoreline changes from danger-facing lookout into sheltering welcome; Squeaky departs to carry Aida's message home.
Storm has passed; the gathering circle becomes Keen's place of belonging and his cuffs become crystal-set.
The cove settles into golden-hour peace; the world is warm again but still carries rain traces and the cost of the day.
